001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.configuration;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.UserProfileRepository;
005import jakarta.servlet.FilterChain;
006import jakarta.servlet.ServletException;
007import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;
008import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;
009import java.io.IOException;
010import java.util.Optional;
011import org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;
012import org.springframework.security.core.context.SecurityContextHolder;
013import org.springframework.security.oauth2.server.resource.authentication.JwtAuthenticationToken;
014import org.springframework.web.filter.OncePerRequestFilter;
015
016/**
017 * Enforces {@link UserProfile#getUserEnabled()} for authenticated requests.
018 *
019 * <p>Business rule: {@code GET /users/me} is always allowed for authenticated users to support
020 * first-login profile creation/bootstrap.</p>
021 */
022public class UserEnabledFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {
023
024  private final UserProfileRepository userProfileRepository;
025
026  /**
027   * Creates a filter that consults {@link UserProfileRepository} to determine whether an
028   * authenticated principal is enabled.
029   *
030   * @param userProfileRepository repository used to resolve {@link UserProfile} records.
031   */
032  public UserEnabledFilter(UserProfileRepository userProfileRepository) {
033    this.userProfileRepository = userProfileRepository;
034  }
035
036  @Override
037  protected void doFilterInternal(
038      HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain)
039      throws ServletException, IOException {
040
041    String path = request.getRequestURI();
042    String contextPath = request.getContextPath();
043    if (contextPath != null && !contextPath.isEmpty() && path.startsWith(contextPath)) {
044      path = path.substring(contextPath.length());
045    }
046
047    if ("GET".equalsIgnoreCase(request.getMethod()) && "/users/me".equals(path)) {
048      filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
049      return;
050    }
051
052    Authentication authentication = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();
053    if (authentication == null || !authentication.isAuthenticated()) {
054      filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
055      return;
056    }
057
058    if (!isEnabled(authentication)) {
059      response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN);
060      return;
061    }
062
063    filterChain.doFilter(request, response);
064  }
065
066  private boolean isEnabled(Authentication authentication) {
067    Object principal = authentication.getPrincipal();
068    if (principal instanceof UserProfile profile) {
069      return profile.getUserEnabled();
070    }
071    if (authentication instanceof JwtAuthenticationToken jwtAuthenticationToken) {
072      String subject = jwtAuthenticationToken.getToken().getSubject();
073      Optional<UserProfile> profile = userProfileRepository.findByOauthKey(subject);
074      // If we can't resolve a profile for an authenticated principal, fail closed.
075      return profile.map(UserProfile::getUserEnabled).orElse(false);
076    }
077    // For non-JWT authentication types (primarily test scaffolding), don't block.
078    return true;
079  }
080
081}
082
